series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on attorneys who have applied to serve as special counsel to the Ohio Attorney General''s Office''s Collections Enforcement section. Records include, but are not limited to, copies of signed retention agreements, Bureau of Workers Compensation insurance certificate, appointment letter, activity tracking reports and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: from expiration of appointment, unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: from expiration of appointment
